summary_ja: 名古屋市中区の横断歩道で、21歳の角田圭容疑者が車で29歳の村田茜さんをはね、約200メートル引きずったまま逃走したとみられ、過失運転致死の疑いで逮捕された。村田さんは搬送後、約2時間半で死亡した。

sentences.grammar_ja: 記事本文ではなく、サイトの計測用に埋め込まれたHTMLタグです。英語学習の対象文ではありません。

sentences.text: Man arrested over hit-and-run death of 29-year-old woman in Nagoya
sentences.grammar_ja: 見出しは現在形の受動態（Man arrested）で、over + 事件内容（hit-and-run death）という犯罪報道の定型表現です。

sentences.text: Police in Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture, have arrested a 21-year-old man on suspicion of negligent driving resulting in death in a hit-and-run incident.
sentences.grammar_ja: have arrested は完了形で「すでに逮捕した」ニュースの定番表現。on suspicion of は「〜の疑いで」。resulting in death は現在分詞句で結果を付加します。

sentences.text: According to police, Kei Tsunoda, a 21-year-old company employee from Oharu town in Aichi Prefecture, is accused of hitting Akane Murata on a pedestrian crossing in Nagoya’s Naka Ward at around 1:30 a.m.
sentences.grammar_ja: According to police で情報源を示す。同格の名詞句（a 21-year-old company employee...）が人名を説明。be accused of + -ing は「〜した疑いがある」。at around はおおよその時刻。
倒置された短い付加句で、前の文の時刻情報を補足。報道ソース（Tokai TV reported）を示すニュース文体です。

sentences.text: Police said Tsunoda was driving a van and hit Murata while he was making a right turn at an intersection.
sentences.grammar_ja: Police said + 間接話法。while he was making は過去進行形で、はねた瞬間の進行中の動作（右折中）を表します。

sentences.text: Murata was found lying approximately 200 meters away, and police believe she was dragged along by the van which kept going.
sentences.grammar_ja: was found lying は「〜した状態で見つかった」。dragged along by は受動態。which kept going は関係代名詞whichが先行詞the vanを修飾。

sentences.text: She was taken to hospital where she died about 2 1/2 hours later.
sentences.grammar_ja: where は場所の関係副詞（病院で）。about 2 1/2 hours later で「約2時間半後に」という時間経過を示します。

sentences.text: Tsunoda returned to the scene and was arrested by police after his vehicle was identified from street surveillance camera footage.
sentences.grammar_ja: returned to the scene は「現場に戻った」。after + 過去形節で時系列。was identified from ... footage は「〜の映像から特定された」という受動表現。

vocabulary.example: on suspicion of negligent driving resulting in death
hitting Akane Murata on a pedestrian crossing
making a right turn at an intersection
she was dragged along by the van
arrested on suspicion of negligent driving
identified from street surveillance camera footage

grammar_points.title: Passive voice in crime headlines
grammar_points.rule: Headlines often use passive voice without auxiliaries: Subject + past participle (+ optional agent phrase with by).
grammar_points.meaning_ja: 犯罪ニュースの見出しでは、誰が逮捕したかより事件そのものを前面に出すため、受動態の短い形がよく使われます。

grammar_points.title: on suspicion of + noun/-ing
grammar_points.rule: Use 'on suspicion of' to state the alleged offense when reporting an arrest.
grammar_points.example: arrested a 21-year-old man on suspicion of negligent driving
grammar_points.meaning_ja: 逮捕報道で「〜の疑いで」という公式な言い方をする定型表現です。

grammar_points.title: According to + source
grammar_points.rule: Place 'According to [authority/media]' at the start of a sentence to attribute information.
grammar_points.example: According to police, Kei Tsunoda ... is accused of hitting Akane Murata
grammar_points.meaning_ja: 情報の出所（警察・当局・メディア）を明示するニュース英語の基本パターンです。

grammar_points.title: while + past continuous
grammar_points.rule: Use 'while + was/were + -ing' to show one action was in progress when another happened.
grammar_points.example: hit Murata while he was making a right turn
grammar_points.meaning_ja: ある動作の最中に別の出来事が起きたことを、背景動作を過去進行形で表します。
